description: LLM Portfolio Insights - AI-powered portfolio analysis using OpenAI API with zero new dependencies

userStories.title: OpenAI API Client Implementation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a zero-dependency OpenAI client so the app can request completions without adding external libraries.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `llm/openai.go` with HTTP client using `net/http`
Implement chat completions endpoint (`POST /v1/chat/completions`)
Read API key from `OPENAI_KEY` environment variable
Read model from `OPENAI_MODEL` env var, default to `gpt-5.2`
Handle streaming disabled (simple JSON response)
Return structured error on API failure (rate limit, auth, network)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: System Prompt Engineering
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a well-crafted system prompt so the LLM provides actionable financial insights.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `llm/prompt.go` with system prompt constant
Instruct LLM to act as financial analyst
Request analysis of: diversification, sector allocation, risk exposure, performance vs benchmarks
Request actionable insights and potential concerns
Format output as markdown with headers
Include disclaimer about not being financial advice
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Portfolio Context Builder
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to build a structured prompt with portfolio data so the LLM has full context for analysis.
acceptanceCriteria: Add context builder functions to `llm/prompt.go`
For single account: include account name, holdings, all transactions, performance metrics (gain, yield, dividends)
For full portfolio: aggregate all accounts with same data
Format data as structured text (not JSON) for better LLM comprehension
Include current date for temporal context
Keep prompt under 8000 tokens estimate (truncate oldest transactions if needed)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add Summarize Keybinding
userStories.description: As a user, I want to press Ctrl+S to trigger AI analysis of my portfolio or current account.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `Summarize` key binding to `KeyMap` struct in `tui/keys.go`: `ctrl+s`
Add help text: 'Ctrl+S' -> 'AI insights'
Add to `FullHelp()` return under General section
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Scrollable Insights Modal
userStories.description: As a user, I want to view AI insights in a scrollable floating window so I can read long responses.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `tui/views/insights.go` with `InsightsView` component
Floating modal centered on screen (80% width, 70% height)
Scrollable content area using charmbracelet/bubbles/viewport
Styled header showing 'Portfolio Insights' or 'Account: {name} Insights'
Footer showing scroll position and available actions (Esc to close, c to copy)
Arrow keys and j/k for scrolling, Esc to close
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Copy to Clipboard
userStories.description: As a user, I want to copy the AI insights to clipboard so I can save or share them.
acceptanceCriteria: Add clipboard utility in `utils/clipboard.go`
Use shell fallback: `pbcopy` on macOS, `xclip -selection clipboard` on Linux
Export `CopyToClipboard(text string) error` function
Handle clipboard errors gracefully (return error, don't panic)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Integrate Insights Modal into TUI
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to wire the insights modal into the main TUI model and handle the async API flow.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `ModalInsights` to `ModalType` enum in `tui/messages.go`
Add `InsightsLoadedMsg` and `InsightsErrorMsg` message types
Add `insightsView` field to `Model` struct in `tui/model.go`
On `Ctrl+S` in ViewAccounts: dispatch async API call for full portfolio
On `Ctrl+S` in ViewAccountDetail: dispatch async API call for selected account
Show loading state in status bar while API call runs
On success: populate and show insights modal
On error: show error message inside the modal
Add 'c' key handler in modal to copy content and show confirmation in status bar
Esc closes modal and returns to previous view
Typecheck passes
